languages.text: {n}Вскоре появляется сержант-хирургеон с флягой и кружкой с гербом Астра Милитарум. Дождавшись кивка полковника, он переливает содержимое сосуда в кружку. Тяжелый запах разложения окутывает всех присутствующих.{/n} "Ну, Ваша Светлость, не передумали?"

{n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"
languages.original_text: {n}Вскоре появляется сержант-хирургеон с флягой и кружкой с гербом Астра Милитарум. Дождавшись кивка полковника, он переливает содержимое сосуда в кружку. Тяжелый запах разложения окутывает всех присутствующих.{/n} "Ну, Ваша Светлость, не передумали?"

traits.locale_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the Colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the vessel into the cup. The heavy odour of rot blankets the room.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

{n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot blankets the room.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

{n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and an old, worn bowl bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for a nod, he pours the contents of the vessel into the bowl. And it does not look overly appealing.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

The heavy odour of rot blankets the room.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

The heavy odour of rot blankets the room.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

{n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

languages.text: {n}まもなく衛生軍曹が、アストラ・ミリタルムの紋章が刻まれた使い込まれた古い椀と、薬液の入った瓶を手に現れる。うなずきを待ってから、容器の中身を椀に注ぎ入れる。見た目は決してそそられない代物だ。{/n}「さて、{mf|閣下|閣下}、いまさら迷われたりはしていませんね？」
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and an old, worn bowl bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for a nod, he pours the contents of the vessel into the bowl. And it does not look overly appealing.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}まもなく衛生軍曹が、アストラ・ミリタルムの紋章が刻まれた使い込まれた古い椀と、薬液の入った瓶を手に現れる。うなずきを待ってから、容器の中身を椀に注ぎ入れる。見た目は決してそそられない代物だ。{/n}「さて、{mf|閣下|閣下}、いまさら迷われたりはしていませんね？」

languages.text: {n}Le sergent-chirurgeon arrive peu après avec une fiole et une coupe portant l'emblème de l'Astra Militarum. Il attend l'approbation de son supérieur, puis verse le contenu de la fiole dans la coupe. L'odeur prégnante de la charogne sature l'air ambiant.{/n} « Ne me dites pas que vous hésitez, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sergent-chirurgeon arrive peu après avec une fiole et une coupe portant l'emblème de l'Astra Militarum. Il attend l'approbation de son supérieur, puis verse le contenu de la fiole dans la coupe. L'odeur prégnante de la charogne sature l'air ambiant.{/n} « Ne me dites pas que vous hésitez, Votre Seigneurie ? »

{n}Le sergent-chirurgien arrive peu après avec une fiole et une coupe portant l'emblème de l'Astra Militarum. Il attend l'approbation de son supérieur, puis verse le contenu de la fiole dans la coupe. L'odeur prégnante de la charogne envahit la pièce.{/n} « Ne me dites pas que vous hésitez, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: {n}Cerrahi çavuş, kısa süre sonra bir matara ve üzerinde Astra Militarum arması bulunan bir bardak ile geliyor. Albay'ın onayını bekledikten sonra kabın içindekileri kâseye boşaltıyor. Havayı ağır bir çürüme kokusu kaplıyor.{/n} "Fikrinizi değiştirmediğiniz, değil mi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

{n}Cerrahi çavuş, kısa süre sonra bir matara ve üzerinde Astra Militarum arması bulunan bir bardak ile geliyor. Albay'ın onayını bekledikten sonra kabın içindekileri kâseye boşaltıyor. Odayı ağır bir çürüme kokusu kaplıyor.{/n} "Fikrinizi değiştirmediğiniz, değil mi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: {n}El sargento cirujano no tarda en aparecer con un frasco y una taza que tiene el emblema del Astra Militarum. Tras esperar a que el coronel asienta con la cabeza, vierte el contenido del frasco en la taza. Un intenso hedor a podredumbre impregna el aire.{/n} «Bien, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No irá a cambiar de parecer, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento cirujano no tarda en aparecer con un frasco y una taza que tiene el emblema del Astra Militarum. Tras esperar a que el coronel asienta con la cabeza, vierte el contenido del frasco en la taza. Un intenso hedor a podredumbre impregna el aire.{/n} «Bien, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No irá a cambiar de parecer, ¿verdad?».

{n}El sargento cirujano no tarda en aparecer con un frasco y una taza que tiene el emblema del Astra Militarum. Tras esperar a que el coronel asienta con la cabeza, vierte el contenido del frasco en la taza. Un intenso hedor a podredumbre invade la habitación.{/n} «Bien, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No irá a cambiar de parecer, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: {n}很快，船医军士拿着一支长颈瓶和一个印有星界军标志的杯子出现了。得到上校的点头同意后，他将长颈瓶里的东西倒入杯中。浓重的腐臭味弥漫在空气里。{/n}“好了，大人，您不会反悔吧？”
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}很快，船医军士拿着一支长颈瓶和一个印有星界军标志的杯子出现了。得到上校的点头同意后，他将长颈瓶里的东西倒入杯中。浓重的腐臭味弥漫在空气里。{/n}“好了，大人，您不会反悔吧？”

languages.text: {n}Wenig später erscheint der Sergeant-Chirurgeum mit einer Flasche und einem Becher mit dem Wappen des Astra Militarum. Als der Colonel nickt, gießt er den Inhalt der Flasche in den Becher. Der süßliche Geruch von Verwesung erfüllt den Raum.{/n} "Na, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr überlegt es Euch doch nicht anders, oder?"
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"
